name: cli-chat
description: A real-time CLI chat application with TUI

scripts.server:dev: npm run db:maybe-clear -w @cli-chat/backend && npm run build -w @cli-chat/shared && npm run db:seed -w @cli-chat/backend && npm run dev -w @cli-chat/backend
scripts.server:start: npm run build -w @cli-chat/shared -w @cli-chat/backend && npm run start -w @cli-chat/backend
scripts.tui:dev: npm run build -w @cli-chat/shared && npm run dev -w @cli-chat/frontend
scripts.tui:start: npm run build -w @cli-chat/shared -w @cli-chat/frontend && npm run start -w @cli-chat/frontend
